name: Ham and Cheese Ball
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the ground ham and Worcestershire sauce.
2. Add the cream cheese, lemon juice, shredded cheddar, onion powder, and Tabasco sauce to the bowl.
3. Mix all ingredients until well combined.
4. Form the mixture into a ball shape.
5. Chill in the refrigerator for at least 1 hour before serving.
